column3: Addition of a resource into a project
column4: Respective Project BA or the Senior resource in the project
column5: Project Owner (Exiting / New) / Executives to approve
column6:
- Dinesh (BA team) (dineshckp@mallow-tech.com) to update the resource in the Hubble.

- Network Team need to provide the repo access, Design related and the mantis access for the project (if any)

- Existing Project owner needs to provide approval for the change.
column7:
For resource addition request - Respective BA to send an additional request to Project Owner / Executive to get an approval.

BA need to get the Bitbucket Repo name from project owner for which the new resource need access, also to get the Mantis access for the Project to get these approved during the addition. Once approved Network team will provide the access for the mentioned Repo name, design related and Mantis access for the project.
column8:
To : Project Owner (New Project and Existing Project) / pm@mallow-tech.com
CC: pm@mallow-tech.com, ciso@mallow-tech.com, network-team@mallow-tech.com, Team lead, hr@mallow-tech.com, Project BA, dineshckp@mallow-tech.com, jagajeevan@mallow-tech.com

Subject : Request for addition of resource - xxxx

Note : Once approved,
- Existing Project owner needs to approve the request*
- Dinesh (BA Team) will update in Hubble.
- Network Team will provide the repo access, design related and mantis access for the project (if any)

Mandatory Fields:

-Resource Name, Email
-Parent Project Name
-Percentage Utilisation
-Allocation From
-Resource Type
-Utilisation Start Date
-Reporting Person
-Other project related access (Repository, Mantis, Sketch, Figma and etc...)

Optional Fields:

- Allocation To (mention if applicable)
- Utilisation End Date (if not sure, please mention as “Ongoing”)
